# zstack_scheduler_job (Resource)

Manages a scheduler job in ZStack.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the scheduler job.
- `target_resource_uuid` (String) The UUID of the target resource for the scheduler job.
- `type` (String) The type of the scheduler job.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description for the scheduler job.

### Read-Only

- `job_class_name` (String) The job class name of the scheduler job.
- `job_data` (String) The job data of the scheduler job.
- `state` (String) The state of the scheduler job.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the scheduler job.
